name: BioNatto Plus
description: BioNatto Plus is an enhanced formulation combining Nattokinase NSK-SD®, French maritime pine bark extract and grape seed extract. It is a natural supplement meant for blood pressure, improve blood circulation and reduce cholesterol.
benefits: Reduce Numbness in Hands and Feet

dosage.therapeutic: 2 capsules twice daily after breakfast & dinner
dosage.maintenance: 1-2 capsules once daily after a meal

who_can_consume: Adults concerned about blood pressure, blood circulation, DVT, cholesterol, numbness in hand and legs.
who_cannot_consume: Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant or breastfeeding.

qa.question: How long does it take to see results?
qa.answer: Usually 6-8 weeks. This is a natural supplement with no side effects.

qa.question: Can I consume BioNatto Plus if I'm taking blood‑thinning medication
qa.answer: Yes, BioNatto Plus does not contain any vitamin K2 which affects blood‑thinning medication. It is safe to consume and we recommend you to consume 1 hour apart from your medicines

qa.question: Can I consume BioNatto Plus with other supplements like fish oil or CoQ10?
qa.answer: Yes, BioNatto Plus is also a health supplement. It can be taken with other health supplements

qa.question: Is BioNatto Plus safe for the kidneys?
qa.answer: Yes, BioNatto Plus is safe and does not affect the kidneys.

qa.question: Is BioNatto Plus safe for long term consumption?
qa.answer: Yes, BioNatto Plus is safe and we have many customers taking it for the long term.

qa.question: How long is BioNatto Plus in the market?
qa.answer: BioNatto Plus was in the market since 2009.

qa.question: Is BioNatto Plus safe for pregnant ladies?
qa.answer: We have not done any safety study for pregnancy. Hence, we do not recommend you to consume during pregnancy.

qa.question: Can I take BioNatto Plus with other medications?
qa.answer: Yes, generally we recommend you to consume 1 hour apart from your medicines
